caption: usydchocsoc 30w CHOCOHOLICS! WANT SOME AMAZING DISCOUNTS? 💸 🤑 Here's our sponsorships for 2025! 😍 We've finally received our NEW membership cards - so make sure to come by our future events to collect your very own card!* 💳 🍫 Finally, a huge thank you to our friends for making this happen! @bloomacarons @bubbleninitea @butterleaf.life @dulcitodesserts @fresh_and_hot_malatang @hendryscoffee @kkini_pocha @mochiric @salspizzaaus @tanghulu_sydney @topimpressionbakery Psst! Make sure to check out each sponsor's individual IG post for the specifics on the partnership 😎 📲 *Must be apart of our $5 annual USU membership! Join with link in bio! ✍️ #usyd #universityofsydney #sydney #university #unilife #society

usydchocsoc Edited • 3d ‼️WHATS UP CHOCOHOLICS‼️ Need a break from uni 📚? Assignments got you feeling meltdown mode ✏️? Come dip into happiness at our chocolate fountain next week 🍫! Psa: we’ve got LOADSSSS OF TOPPINGS (rumours says there’s strawberries 🍓 , bananas 🍌 , pretzels 🥨 , rice bubbles and more… 🤫👀) First come, First serve, before the fountain runs dry🏜️🍫 !! 🗓️ Date: 26th March ⏰ Time: 2:30- 4pm 📍Location: ISL timber floors 💰 COST 💰: Members + USU = FREE Non-Member + USU = Only $2 Non-Member/Non-USU = $5 #usyd #universityofsydney #unilife #chocolate

usydchocsoc 1w CHOCOHOLICS ITS TIME FOR TRIVIA ‼ 🎉🎊 Get ready to test your knowledge 🧠 , challenge your friends 👬, and enjoy a night full of laughs, friendly competition, and great vibes! 🏆✨ Whether you’re a trivia master or just coming for the fun, it’s the perfect way to break up your week! Just swing by Suwak SR 225 with your friends or join a team when you arrive! Stick around, meet new people, and see if your team has what it takes to take the win! 🤔📚 Bring your friends, bring your brainpower, and get ready for a night of trivia, laughs, and bragging rights! 🎤🏆🧠 Signups here: https://bit.ly/4urQ4ll 🗓️ Date: Friday 20th March ⏰ Time: 5:00pm - 8:00pm 📍 Location: Susan Wakil Seminar Room 225 💰 COST 💰 Members + USU = FREE Non-Member + USU = Only $2 Non-Member/Non-USU = $5

Friday 13th March ⏰ Time: 11:00am – 1:00pm 📍 Location: ISL 💰 COST 💰: Members + USU = FREE Non-Member + USU = $2 Non-Member/Non-USU = $4 See you there… don’t get fomo! 🍫💫 #usyd #universityofsydney #sydney #university #unilife

usydchocsoc 2w 📢CHOCSOC GOES TO MUDGEE !!! 🚗🍫 Wanna be on the next trip instead of just hearing about it 👀? Subcommittee applications close ‼️TOMORROW‼️Check our pinned post on instagram for more details, don’t miss out !! Love, Chocsoc ❤️🍫 #universityofsydney #usyd #unilife #roadtrip

usydchocsoc 2w WHAT'S UP CHOCOHOLICS! 😤🗯️ What better way to start your Tuesday than with a FREE DONUT! 🍩🤑 This early week sweet treat is sure to make the rest of your day upbeat! 🙂‍↕️ 🎶 You don't even have to think about it, it's a no brainer to come!! 🤔🏃🏃‍♀️ No sign-up needed, just swing by ISL or stick around and have a chat with the sweetest students at USYD!! 🥰 Or show up to your tutorial in style, with your doughnut in hand, sure to make your classmates jealous! 📚🍽️ 🗓️ Date: Tuesday 3rd March ⏰ Time: 11:00am - 1:00pm 📍Location: International Student Lounge (Wentworth Building) 💰 COST 💰: Members + USU = FREE Non-Member + USU = Only $2 Non-Member/Non-USU = $5

usydchocsoc 3w Meet our 2026 Chocsoc President: Amo! Being a constant steady and reliable backbone for our society and members, Amo brings the swag and positive vibes✨, reminding us to just keep swimming 🤿🐟 even when we’re down. Besides joining chocsoc, our best decision is making you our President! We Amor you <3! Chocsoc President Amorino Tooongart! 💝🍫
Max Ma! *still not an actual doctor… YET!

usydchocsoc Edited • 2w We’re not quite sure about undefeated in drinking 🍻… but we are sure that with Dhinesh, chocsoc is undefeatable💪! With a goofy laid back aura, he definitely has given us whiplash with how trustworthy and reliable he can come to be - half of our events wouldn’t be possible without Dhinesh! Kinder Joy? More like Chocsoc’s Joy! We welcome our Joy Kindler Dhinesh Ponnappan as our 2026 Vice President! 🤗

usydchocsoc 3w Whittaker… risk taker… mood maker 😝. If we had a penny for every time Allison had showed up and supported Chocsoc, we might be free of our debt! Just spending time with Allison heals the tit and tats we suffer through the academic semester 🥺💖. I know my life could hit the ‘sweet max’ 🍫 with a little bit of Chocsoc’s 2026 Secretary in it… Allison Liu!
